name: HEVN, inc
long_description:
HEVN is the automated USD account for global internet companies, built for humans and AI agents.

Every international company today runs a fragmented finance stack: Mercury for US banking, Wise for FX, Deel for payroll, and Stripe for revenue. Legacy banks can't be automated, can't move at internet speed, and can't be operated by software. We believe every modern company will need a second account - one built on stablecoin rails, accessible via API, secure by design for autonomous code, and covering all operational primitives of a global business.

HEVN is that account: receive USD globally, hold treasury in USD/USDC, and run every payment operation a global business needs - invoices, contracts, contractor payouts, vendor payments, payroll - in local currencies through local banks worldwide, with a single click or API call.

Team previously built HOT Labs - 15M users, $100M TVL, #1 crypto app on DappRadar for 8 months. Operated companies across SF, UAE, BVI, and HK, and felt all the pain of global payments automation ourselves.
one_liner: The automated USD account for global internet companies
